title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
